Name: FSplineMeshParams
Description:
Structure that holds info about spline, passed to renderer to deform UStaticMesh.
  Also used by Lightmass, so be sure to update Lightmass::FSplineMeshParams and the static lighting code if this changes!

Variables.Name: StartPos
Variables.Description: Start location of spline, in component space.

Variables.Name: StartTangent
Variables.Description: Start tangent of spline, in component space.

Variables.Name: StartScale
Variables.Description: X and Y scale applied to mesh at start of spline.

Variables.Name: StartRoll
Variables.Description: Roll around spline applied at start

Variables.Name: StartOffset
Variables.Description: Starting offset of the mesh from the spline, in component space.

Variables.Name: EndPos
Variables.Description: End location of spline, in component space.

Variables.Name: EndTangent
Variables.Description: End tangent of spline, in component space.

Variables.Name: EndScale
Variables.Description: X and Y scale applied to mesh at end of spline.

Variables.Name: EndRoll
Variables.Description: Roll around spline applied at end.

Variables.Name: EndOffset
Variables.Description: Ending offset of the mesh from the spline, in component space.
